title: Job interview feedback
explanation:
Job interview feedback

Listen to a manager giving feedback after an interview.

Transcript

Manager: Thank you for coming in today. You communicated clearly and gave strong examples from your previous role. However, we felt you did not show enough detail about how you handle conflict in a team. We are keeping your application on file and may contact you if another position opens. I would advise you to prepare more concrete stories about problem-solving before your next interview.

questions.text: The manager wanted more detail about handling [*conflict|salary|travel].
The application will be kept [*on file|rejected immediately|published online].
The manager advises preparing stories about [*problem-solving|holiday plans|office design].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The feedback mentions strong examples from a previous ____.  | *role | flight | recipe
The company may contact the candidate if another ____ opens. | *position | platform | storm
The manager's advice is to prepare more ____ stories. | *concrete | musical | ancient
The overall result is not an immediate job ____.  | *offer | ticket | vaccine
The candidate's communication was seen as a [*strength|weakness|irrelevant detail].
Team conflict was treated as an area needing more [*evidence|money|equipment].
